title: centranthus angustifolius subsp. nevadensis
intro: Centranthus angustifolius subsp. nevadensis, also known as the Nevada centranthus, is a plant species within the Valerianaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Centranthus angustifolius subsp. nevadensis include its ability to soothe irritated throats and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, as well as its potential to act as an antispasmodic and antiseptic. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
